title: Eclipsemon
description: Cobblemon and anything else I thought sounded cool
body:
A modpack Mainly focusing on Cobblemon. There is tons of terrain and other mod added to spice it up. 
Some of my favorites include:
- Cobblemon
- Man of Many Planes
- Simple Voice Chat
- Terrablender
- Trinkets
- Unidye
- Immersive Aircrafts






 Some Important Keybinds:
- R- throw pokemon
- 1- open summary
- 2- open pc
- 3- open berry pouch
- 4- open backpack
- 5- open world map
- 6- see screenshots
- 7- new waypoint
- 8- prox chat menu
- 9- mute prox chat mic
- 0- Spit
